description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

�新 New post (Published: July 15, 2026)

AI summary (Please check the original article for accurate information)

eLTAX (Local Tax Portal Site) will be undergoing a system upgrade. Service will be suspended from September 19, 2026 (Saturday) 0:00 to September 24, 2026 (Thursday) 8:30. During this period, you will not be able to use eLTAX or eL-QR for electronic filing, electronic payment, or other local tax procedures. We apologize for the inconvenience and appreciate your understanding and cooperation.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/somubu/shuzeika/13923.html
summary: ℹ️ eLTAX service suspension due to system upgrade in September 2026 (Reiwa 8)
